pageIntro: Got a ghost problem? A media inquiry? Just want to say hey? We're listening.
quoteLine: You know who to call (or in this case, email).
reachOutText: The best way to reach Ghostbusters Virginia is via email. For faster responses, message us on any of our social media channels.
bookingText: Interested in having Ghostbusters Virginia appear at your event, convention, or community gathering? We love supporting charitable and community causes across the Commonwealth. Send us a message with the event details — date, location, and what you have in mind — and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
metaDescription: Get in touch with Ghostbusters Virginia — reach us via email, social media, or smoke signal.
ogDescription: Reach Ghostbusters Virginia for event bookings, media inquiries, or just to say hey.
